greeting.speaker: Frank
greeting.text: You came. Good. Sit down and don't make a lot of noise.

whats_going_on.speaker: Frank
whats_going_on.text: Everything. All at once. Same as it happened to me.

earl_sent.speaker: Frank
earl_sent.text: Earl's a good man. Smarter than he looks. Sit down.

scared.speaker: Frank
scared.text: Good. Fear means you're still the one driving.

frank_story.speaker: Frank
frank_story.text: I was like you once. Came to a town. Quiet job. Friendly faces. Didn't ask questions.

frank_story_2.speaker: Frank
frank_story_2.text: Then a man in a suit started giving me things to do. Called them tests. Said it was routine.

frank_story_3.speaker: Frank
frank_story_3.text: And then one morning I woke up and there were two of me. One that wanted coffee. One that had a job to finish.

choices.text: That sounds like what's happening to me.

what_job.speaker: Frank
what_job.text: Doesn't matter. I didn't finish it. That's all that matters.

happening_to_me.speaker: Frank
happening_to_me.text: I know it is. That's why I'm still here. Been waiting for someone like you.

breakdown.speaker: Frank
breakdown.text: Maybe it was. Or maybe a breakdown is just what they call it when you wake up.

offer.speaker: Frank
offer.text: I got a truck. Half a tank. And I know a road out of here that isn't on any map.

choices.text: You're asking me to leave with you.

leave_yes.speaker: Frank
leave_yes.text: Tonight. Before that man finishes what he started.

leave_no.speaker: Frank
leave_no.text: You got nothing holding you here that they didn't put there.

stay.speaker: Frank
stay.text: Best case? You end up like me. Worst case? You end up like you were supposed to.

escape_good.speaker: Frank
escape_good.text: Good kid. Truck's round back. Don't stop for anything.

more_time.speaker: Frank
more_time.text: You don't have it. But alright. You know where I'll be.

staying.speaker: Frank
staying.text: Then God help you. And I mean that sincerely.

farewell.speaker: Frank
farewell.text: Whatever you decide. Be the one deciding it.

greeting_return.speaker: Frank
greeting_return.text: Truck's still there. Clock's still running.
